Class ReactiveKeyCommands.CopyCommand

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyCommand
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveKeyCommands.CopyCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
ReactiveRedisConnection.Command
Enclosing interface:
ReactiveKeyCommands
public static class ReactiveKeyCommands.CopyCommand extends ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyCommand
MOVE command parameters.

2.0

  • Method Details

    • key

      public static ReactiveKeyCommands.CopyCommand key(ByteBuffer key)
      Creates a new ReactiveKeyCommands.CopyCommand given a key.
      Parameters:
      key - must not be null.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveKeyCommands.CopyCommand for key.

    • to

      public ReactiveKeyCommands.CopyCommand to(ByteBuffer targetKey)
      Applies the targetKey. Constructs a new command instance with all previously configured properties.
      Parameters:
      targetKey - must not be null.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveKeyCommands.CopyCommand with database applied.

    • replace

      public ReactiveKeyCommands.CopyCommand replace(boolean replace)
      Applies replace. Constructs a new command instance with all previously configured properties.
      Parameters:
      replace -
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveKeyCommands.CopyCommand with replace applied.

    • database

      public ReactiveKeyCommands.CopyCommand database(int database)
      Applies the database index. Constructs a new command instance with all previously configured properties.
      Parameters:
      database -
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveKeyCommands.CopyCommand with database applied.
